role: Member of Technical Staff (AI Software Engineer, Agents)
hero_headline: Your Agents team builds agents that act, not chat. So do I, with 7 in production. I built this page 9 minutes after the role posted.
hero_subline: The Comet vision is agents that navigate the world and do real work. My agents already read email, build a Next.js app, deploy it to Vercel and publish it, autonomously, every day, with Playwright driving the browser.
pitch_oneliner: Week 1: take one Comet action that still needs a human, wrap it in a tool interface with a permission gate and an eval, and ship an agent that completes it end-to-end without supervision.

jd_match.requirement: Design AI agents that navigate the digital world and perform valuable units of work
jd_match.proof: empresaAI: 7 agents that read email, decide, build, deploy and publish over a file-based bus, with no human in the loop.
ManoloBot drives Chromium with Playwright to record demos and validate every app it ships before it goes live.

jd_match.requirement: Context engineering and tool interfaces for frontier AI models
jd_match.proof: I build tool interfaces on the Claude API and MCP so agents call real functions with typed contracts, not free-text guesses.

jd_match.requirement: Proficiency in Python (bonus points for TypeScript)
jd_match.proof: Python and TypeScript daily across empresaAI and ManoloBot; Next.js, Vercel and Supabase end to end.
